mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info( order_no, user_id, total_amount, status ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status} )
INSERT INTO order_item( order_no, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, total_amount ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM order_info WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT id, order_no, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, total_amount, create_time FROM order_item WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY id ASC
